title: IdempotencyRecord
description: An internal record of an idempotent request. Retained for 24 hours. If the same key is reused with a different payload, a 409 error is returned. This schema defines the public contract shape only.

key.description: The idempotency key from the Idempotency-Key header.

status.description: Whether the original request is still processing, succeeded, or failed.

request_path.description: The endpoint path of the original request.

response_status_code.description: HTTP status code of the cached response.

expires_at.description: When this record expires (24 hours after creation).
